prompt: Pixel art avatar on pure black background. A unicrab character (crab with unicorn horn) in retro pixel art style, like a 32x32 sprite scaled up. Wide crab body, two dot eyes, a single unicorn horn pointing up from center of head, two small claws on the sides. Monochrome green palette only - use 4-5 shades of green from very dark to very bright for depth. Black background. The pixel grid should be clearly visible - chunky blocky pixels, no anti-aliasing, no smooth curves. Think: Game Boy era sprite art but only in greens. The character should look friendly and recognizable. Fills most of the frame. This will be used as a tiny chat avatar on AR glasses with a green monochrome display.
